THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 16, 2015, in Department 525:
Jossie Go, plaintiff/respondent, appears as propria persona with witness Clay Go.
Doris Paningbatan, defendant/appellant, as propria persona with witness Adoracion Paningbatan. Court appointed Tagalog interpreter Denise Fernandez for Ms. Paningbatan.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Ms. Go testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit not marked - package exhibits: itemized damaged list, pictures, police report.

Ms. Paningbatan testifies on her own behalf through Court interpreter Mr. Fernandez and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence of Ms. Go retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf Jr.; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Judgment Entered
